title: Anime Land
notes: This game is an art tool, in which players can create their own anime girls or boys and print them as stickers. Before starting on the design, the player selects the framework characteristics such as body shape. After establishing the character build, the player proceeds to make cosmetic changes to the face including hair, eyes, brows, nose, mouth, and head shape as well as facial expressions, accessories, clothes, screen backgrounds and patterns, and speech bubbles. In addition to a custom character, the player can also create a custom anime animal or object.

title: PC Collection
notes: This game is a small collection of ten different mini-game activities. Those activities include a word processor, a paint and illustration program, a music composer, a fortune-telling screen with printable charms, a simple fashion designer, jigsaw puzzles, a crane machine game, animal dress up, a calendar, and an address book. The game came packaged with the Loopy Mouse.

title: Nigaoe Artist
notes: This game is designed as an art tool to create caricatures and facial impressions. First the player picks an avatar of a gender and age group. Using the selected avatar as a template, the player can customize the hairstyle, brows, eyes, nose, mouth, head shape and clothes. The parts of the face can be repositioned and resized. Additionally, paint tools can be used to further accessorize the caricature with colors, objects and speech bubbles. To finish off, the caricature can be placed in one of many sceneries provided. The player also has the option to paint their own pictures from scratch or make use of one of the ready made caricatures.

title: Lupiton no Wonder Palette
notes: Lupiton no Wonder Palette is a Miscellaneous game, developed by Axes Art Amuse and published by Casio, which was released in Japan in 1996.

title: Chakrakun no Omajinai Paradise
notes: Based on the manga Magic Cat Chakra-kun, this game contains a number of activities made up of picture puzzles, fortune telling in the form of a slot machine, trivial quizzes, and coloring pages, which can be printed into stickers.

title: Little Romance
notes: Little Romance is a Simulation game, developed and published by Casio, which was released in Japan in 1996.

title: HARIHARI Shīru Paradaisu
notes: The player joins Harihari and her friends in this sticker activity game, which includes animated sticker pages, special occasions stickers, greetings stickers, poster stickers, and a music session. Players can also make their own custom stickers, changing the proportions of objects, selecting the background, adding borders, and implementing some animations with a variety of art tools.

title: Dorīmuchenji Kokinchanno Fasshonpātī
notes: Dream Change: Kogane-chan no Fashion Party is a Miscellaneous game, developed and published by Casio, which was released in Japan in 1995.
